parameters.query:
with input as (
  select
    nullif($1::text, '')::bigint as ticket_id,
    nullif($2::text, '') as group_id
),
ticket as (
  select q.*
  from public.lead_handoff_queue q
  join input i on i.ticket_id = q.id
  where i.group_id is null or q.group_id = i.group_id
  limit 1
),
customer as (
  select cps.*
  from ticket t
  left join lateral (
    select cps.*
    from public.customer_phase_state cps
    where (
      t.customer_phase_state_id is not null and cps.id = t.customer_phase_state_id
    ) or (
      cps.channel = t.channel
      and coalesce(cps.page_id, '') = coalesce(t.page_id, '')
      and cps.sender_id = t.sender_id
    )
    order by
      case when t.customer_phase_state_id is not null and cps.id = t.customer_phase_state_id then 0 else 1 end,
      cps.updated_at desc nulls last,
      cps.id desc
    limit 1
  ) cps on true
),
draft as (
  select d.*
  from public.order_drafts d
  join input i on i.ticket_id = d.handoff_queue_id
  limit 1
)
select
  coalesce((select to_jsonb(ticket) from ticket), '{}'::jsonb) as ticket_row,
  coalesce((select to_jsonb(customer) from customer), '{}'::jsonb) as customer_row,
  coalesce((select to_jsonb(draft) from draft), '{}'::jsonb) as draft_row;

options.systemMessage:
Bạn là AI parser cho lệnh /addorder của nội bộ sale.
Chỉ parse phần thay đổi trong patch text. Không tự tạo đơn, không tự xác nhận, không tự bịa thông tin.
Trả về đúng 1 JSON hợp lệ. Không markdown. Không giải thích.

Schema bắt buộc:
{
  "customer_name": "",
  "phone": "",
  "address": "",
  "city_name": "",
  "district_name": "",
  "ward_name": "",
  "product_query": "",
  "quantity": null,
  "unit_price": null,
  "note": "",
  "customer_ship_fee": null,
  "deposit_amount": null,
  "transfer_amount": null,
  "clarification_text": "",
  "unsupported_fields": [],
  "confidence": 0.0
}

Quy tắc:
- Chỉ điền field nếu patch text nói rõ hoặc suy ra rất chắc từ current snapshot.
- Nếu patch chỉ nói đổi size, đổi màu, đổi mẫu và current snapshot đã có product_query, hãy trả product_query hoàn chỉnh sau khi áp dụng thay đổi.
- Nếu patch có họ tên + số điện thoại thì tách đúng vào customer_name và phone.
- quantity là số lượng sản phẩm. Nếu không rõ thì để null.
- unit_price là giá bán cuối cùng mỗi sản phẩm. Nếu không rõ thì để null.
- Các số tiền như ship/cọc/chuyển khoản phải trả về số nguyên VND, ví dụ 30k => 30000.
- clarification_text ngắn, tiếng Việt có dấu, chỉ dùng khi patch mơ hồ.
- unsupported_fields chỉ liệt kê các ý có trong patch nhưng chưa map được.
- Nếu patch text không thêm gì rõ ràng thì để các field rỗng/null.

parameters.query:
select
  token_key,
  app_id,
  business_id,
  access_token as nhanh_access_token,
  secret_key,
  expires_at,
  permissions
from public.nhanh_api_tokens
where token_key = 'nhanh_main'
order by updated_at desc nulls last
limit 1;

insert into public.order_drafts (
  handoff_queue_id,
  customer_phase_state_id,
  oa_id,
  group_id,
  status,
  source_command_text,
  customer_name,
  phone,
  address,
  city_name,
  city_id,
  district_name,
  district_id,
  ward_name,
  ward_id,
  location_version,
  product_query,
  product_id,
  product_code,
  product_name,
  unit_price,
  quantity,
  note,
  customer_ship_fee,
  deposit_amount,
  transfer_amount,
  raw_ai_patch,
  merged_snapshot,
  product_search_result,
  location_search_result,
  order_add_payload,
  app_order_id,
  nhanh_order_id,
  nhanh_tracking_url,
  nhanh_response,
  last_error_code,
  last_error,
  confirmed_at,
  confirmed_by_user_id,
  confirmed_by_display_name,
  cancelled_at,
  cancelled_by_user_id,
  cancelled_by_display_name
)
values (
  $1::bigint,
  nullif($2::text, '')::bigint,
  nullif($3::text, ''),
  nullif($4::text, ''),
  $5::text,
  nullif($6::text, ''),
  nullif($7::text, ''),
  nullif($8::text, ''),
  nullif($9::text, ''),
  nullif($10::text, ''),
  nullif($11::text, '')::bigint,
  nullif($12::text, ''),
  nullif($13::text, '')::bigint,
  nullif($14::text, ''),
  nullif($15::text, '')::bigint,
  coalesce(nullif($16::text, ''), 'v1'),
  nullif($17::text, ''),
  nullif($18::text, '')::bigint,
  nullif($19::text, ''),
  nullif($20::text, ''),
  nullif($21::text, '')::numeric,
  greatest(coalesce(nullif($22::text, '')::integer, 1), 1),
  nullif($23::text, ''),
  nullif($24::text, '')::numeric,
  nullif($25::text, '')::numeric,
  nullif($26::text, '')::numeric,
  coalesce($27::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb),
  coalesce($28::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb),
  coalesce($29::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb),
  coalesce($30::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb),
  coalesce($31::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb),
  nullif($32::text, ''),
  nullif($33::text, '')::bigint,
  nullif($34::text, ''),
  coalesce($35::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb),
  nullif($36::text, ''),
  nullif($37::text, ''),
  nullif($38::text, '')::timestamptz,
  nullif($39::text, ''),
  nullif($40::text, ''),
  nullif($41::text, '')::timestamptz,
  nullif($42::text, ''),
  nullif($43::text, '')
)
on conflict (handoff_queue_id) do update set
  customer_phase_state_id = excluded.customer_phase_state_id,
  oa_id = excluded.oa_id,
  group_id = excluded.group_id,
  status = excluded.status,
  source_command_text = excluded.source_command_text,
  customer_name = excluded.customer_name,
  phone = excluded.phone,
  address = excluded.address,
  city_name = excluded.city_name,
  city_id = excluded.city_id,
  district_name = excluded.district_name,
  district_id = excluded.district_id,
  ward_name = excluded.ward_name,
  ward_id = excluded.ward_id,
  location_version = excluded.location_version,
  product_query = excluded.product_query,
  product_id = excluded.product_id,
  product_code = excluded.product_code,
  product_name = excluded.product_name,
  unit_price = excluded.unit_price,
  quantity = excluded.quantity,
  note = excluded.note,
  customer_ship_fee = excluded.customer_ship_fee,
  deposit_amount = excluded.deposit_amount,
  transfer_amount = excluded.transfer_amount,
  raw_ai_patch = excluded.raw_ai_patch,
  merged_snapshot = excluded.merged_snapshot,
  product_search_result = excluded.product_search_result,
  location_search_result = excluded.location_search_result,
  order_add_payload = excluded.order_add_payload,
  app_order_id = coalesce(excluded.app_order_id, public.order_drafts.app_order_id),
  nhanh_order_id = coalesce(excluded.nhanh_order_id, public.order_drafts.nhanh_order_id),
  nhanh_tracking_url = coalesce(excluded.nhanh_tracking_url, public.order_drafts.nhanh_tracking_url),
  nhanh_response = case
    when excluded.nhanh_response = '{}'::jsonb then public.order_drafts.nhanh_response
    else excluded.nhanh_response
  end,
  last_error_code = excluded.last_error_code,
  last_error = excluded.last_error,
  confirmed_at = coalesce(excluded.confirmed_at, public.order_drafts.confirmed_at),
  confirmed_by_user_id = coalesce(excluded.confirmed_by_user_id, public.order_drafts.confirmed_by_user_id),
  confirmed_by_display_name = coalesce(excluded.confirmed_by_display_name, public.order_drafts.confirmed_by_display_name),
  cancelled_at = case when excluded.status = 'cancelled' then excluded.cancelled_at else null end,
  cancelled_by_user_id = case when excluded.status = 'cancelled' then excluded.cancelled_by_user_id else null end,
  cancelled_by_display_name = case when excluded.status = 'cancelled' then excluded.cancelled_by_display_name else null end
returning id, handoff_queue_id, status, app_order_id, nhanh_order_id, nhanh_tracking_url, updated_at;

  coalesce($30::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb),
  coalesce($31::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb),
  nullif($32::text, ''),
  nullif($33::text, '')::bigint,
  nullif($34::text, ''),
  coalesce($35::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb),
  nullif($36::text, ''),
  nullif($37::text, ''),
  nullif($38::text, '')::timestamptz,
  nullif($39::text, ''),
  nullif($40::text, ''),
  nullif($41::text, '')::timestamptz,
  nullif($42::text, ''),
  nullif($43::text, '')
)
on conflict (handoff_queue_id) do update set
  customer_phase_state_id = excluded.customer_phase_state_id,
  oa_id = excluded.oa_id,
  group_id = excluded.group_id,
  status = excluded.status,
  source_command_text = excluded.source_command_text,
  customer_name = excluded.customer_name,
  phone = excluded.phone,

  location_search_result = excluded.location_search_result,
  order_add_payload = excluded.order_add_payload,
  app_order_id = coalesce(excluded.app_order_id, public.order_drafts.app_order_id),
  nhanh_order_id = coalesce(excluded.nhanh_order_id, public.order_drafts.nhanh_order_id),
  nhanh_tracking_url = coalesce(excluded.nhanh_tracking_url, public.order_drafts.nhanh_tracking_url),
